name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy for Codex — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, and in-app feedback. Bundles the shipeasy MCP server plus the shared area skills (flags, experiments, metrics, i18n, alerts, ops, see, setup). Reuses the exact same skills/ and .mcp.json as the Claude Code plugin; no content is duplicated. All CRUD is delegated to the shipeasy MCP server or CLI; slash commands are Claude-Code-only — in Codex, invoke the plugin with @shipeasy or let the agent pick a bundled skill.

interface.shortDescription: Feature flags, A/B experiments, metrics, translations, and in-app feedback.
